subject: Project Alpha - Kickoff and Timeline
body: Project Alpha is a new customer-facing analytics dashboard replacing the legacy reporting system. Timeline: Beta Launch Apr 21, GA May 12. Tech choices: PostgreSQL plus TimescaleDB, FastAPI, React with Recharts, OAuth2. Original budget is $340K.

subject: Re: Project Alpha - Budget Overrun Risk
body: The extra infrastructure cost could push Project Alpha from $340K to $432K, a 27 percent overrun. I need cost-benefit analysis and sales confirmation before approving the expanded budget.

subject: Project Alpha - Mandatory Security Review Findings
body: Critical issues: cross-tenant data exposure on the timeseries endpoint and per-message WebSocket authentication. High issues: stronger rate limiting, SSRF hardening on report generation, and missing audit logging.

subject: Project Alpha - Phase 1 Complete! Data Pipeline Live
body: Phase 1 is complete. Approval landed for the expanded budget at $410K after savings from spot instances. Kafka, Flink, TimescaleDB, dbt, and Great Expectations are running.

subject: Project Alpha - Early Client Feedback from Beta Waitlist
body: Five prospects gave strong feedback. The immediate pipeline from them is $1.85M ARR and overall tracking is $2.8M ARR, ahead of the $2.1M projection. Requests include custom alerting, exports, API access, and data residency.

subject: Project Alpha - Updated Timeline (Phase 2 delay)
body: Security fixes and the WebSocket gateway extend Phase 2. Beta moves to May 6 and GA moves to May 27. Shipping secure is non-negotiable.

subject: Project Alpha - Frontend Early Progress Update
body: Frontend work is already underway with Storybook, the dashboard layout engine, Recharts components, and SSO integration. The live metric widgets are blocked on the WebSocket gateway.

subject: Team Appreciation Lunch - Next Friday
body: Please join the team appreciation lunch next Friday and fill out the dietary preference form.

subject: Early bird pricing ends soon - TechSummit 2026
body: TechSummit 2026 early bird pricing ends soon. Register now.
